owner_directive: Full ADR-044 implementation: SubWorkflowBlock authoring-only + inline flattening at run start; no-context audit + fix P1-P3; complete integration tests; Chrome e2e; READY FOR REVIEW summary PR. Owner-directed manager session 2026-06-21.

scope_events.reason: Frontend SubWorkflowNode integration spans WorkflowCanvas.parts, App.parts, lib/api, and types beyond nodes/**; widen frontend scope to cover the merged FE agent work + audit fixes.
FR-004 resolved_ports delivery + FR-011/US1-AS3 routes (by-path, import-subworkflow) require api/routes/workflows.py and the SubworkflowPortSurface model in api/schemas.py.
